title: carex × subdecolorans
intro: Carex × subdecolorans, also known as sedge, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help treat wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Carex × subdecolorans include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
